data.title: Mobi appoints industry veteran as Chief Revenue Officer to drive AI-powered travel retail.
data.description: A seasoned industry professional has been appointed as the Chief Revenue Officer by Mobi in Boston. This move is aimed at driving forward their AI-powered travel retail initiatives. This strategic decision is expected to boost revenue and enhance the company's position in the market.

data.title: Imperial Petroleum Inc. releases Q3 & 9M 2025 financial & operating results. Symbol: IMPP. Headquartered in Athens, Greece.
data.description: Athens, Greece - On December 11, 2025, Imperial Petroleum Inc. (NASDAQ: IMPP) revealed its unaudited financial data and operational performance for the third quarter and nine months concluding on September 30, 2025. This company, involved in owning ships and offering services related to petroleum products, crude oil, and dry bulk seaborne transportation, shared the updates.

data.title: Scientific Games partners with Arkansas Scholarship Lottery for eight years to enhance digital loyalty program, drive education proceeds.
data.description: Arkansas residents will now enjoy enhanced benefits through a revamped digital loyalty program, thanks to a recent agreement between Scientific Games and the Arkansas Lottery office. The new eight-year partnership will bring significant improvements to the Scientific Games Enhanced Partnership instant game management program. This collaboration aims to provide players with an enriched gaming experience and increased rewards. The agreement promises to boost player engagement and satisfaction levels in Arkansas over the next eight years.

data.title: Celebrate the holidays stress-free with Crémant d'Alsace, a festive French sparkler perfect for casual gatherings.
data.description: In Colmar, France on December 11, 2025, an alternative way to celebrate the holidays is being suggested. Rather than organizing elaborate dinners with meticulous table settings, the focus is shifting towards more laid-back and enjoyable entertaining options. These can range from casual happy hours and potluck-style meals to gift swaps and intimate evenings with a small group of close friends. This new approach aims to reduce the stress associated with traditional holiday hosting and promote a more relaxing and enjoyable festive season for all.

data.title: Dr. Jeremy A. Scarlett named Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for advancing Interventional Pain Management.
data.description: In Sheboygan, Wisconsin on December 11, 2025, Dr. Jeremy A. Scarlett has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant work in Advancing Interventional Pain Management. Dr. Scarlett is commended for his exceptional contributions in this field, highlighting his expertise and dedication to enhancing pain management techniques.

data.title: Dow fluctuates due to unexpected jobless claims; Oracle stocks drop on earnings. Stay updated with Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed fluctuations following unexpected weekly jobless claims. The stock of AI company Oracle experienced a significant drop in response to their earnings report. This comes amidst live coverage on the latest market happenings. The market reacted negatively to the surprise jobless claims data, impacting investor sentiment. The Dow turned lower due to these factors, reflecting uncertainty in the current economic climate. Overall, these events highlight the volatile nature of the market with important numbers to consider for future investments.
DISNEY SENDS CEASE-AND-DESIST LETTER TO GOOGLE - CNBC

data.title: In 2026, data and AI will transform health industry; SAS predicts changes in discovery, treatment, and delivery care.
data.description: SAS has forecasted that data and AI will significantly impact the healthcare industry in the coming years. By 2026, the focus will be on a gradual, deliberate transformation rather than abrupt changes. This shift will revolutionize how healthcare and life sciences sectors approach discovery, treatment, and delivery of care. The prediction highlights the key role of AI and analytics in reshaping these sectors.

data.title: Broadview Group hires Hayden Medart as Associate to investment team; spent years at RW Baird & Co. in Tech & Services.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in St. Louis, Broadview Group welcomed Hayden Medart as the newest member of their investment team. Hayden comes on board as an Associate following significant experience in investment banking in the Technology & Services sector with RW Baird & Co. This addition reinforces Broadview's dedication to enhancing their team with top talent.

data.title: Winners Inc. completes acquisition of Moneyline Sports Inc. and releases year-end letter to shareholders.
data.description: Winners Inc. has successfully finalized the acquisition of Moneyline Sports Inc. The company released a year-end letter to shareholders highlighting this significant milestone. This merger is projected to boost the company's growth by expanding its market reach and increasing revenue streams. Additionally, this strategic move is expected to result in a 25% increase in overall profit margins for Winners Inc. Shareholders can anticipate a positive impact on the company's financial performance as a result of this acquisition.

data.title: Agencia Comercial Spirits Ltd, a Taiwan-based importer and distributor of high-quality whiskies, announces changes to its board of directors. Symbol: AGCC.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Taichung City, Taiwan, Agencia Comercial Spirits Ltd (NASDAQ: AGCC), a leading importer and distributor of premium whiskies in Taiwan and global markets, revealed modifications to its board of directors.

data.title: NextNav to launch world’s first 5G-powered PNT network in Santa Clara County, California on December 11, a step towards commercialization. $NN.
data.description: NextNav Inc. is set to launch a 5G PNT Network in Santa Clara County, California starting from December 11th. This network, operated by the company known for advanced terrestrial positioning and navigation technology, aims to offer cutting-edge solutions in positioning, navigation, and timing applications. The deployment marks a significant step towards providing a reliable alternative to GPS services. NextNav Inc. (Nasdaq: NN) is moving forward with its mission to lead in 3D geolocation solutions for improved accuracy and performance in the area.

data.title: Teledyne Micropac introduces TDOC8012-04CC0: 12 kV Isolation Optocoupler for aerospace, defense, industrial apps. Key features: 12 kV isolation voltage, 8 kV output reverse breakdown voltage, 850 nm IR LED emitters.
data.description: Teledyne Micropac has recently introduced the TDOC8012-04CC0, a state-of-the-art 12 kV isolation optocoupler tailored to cater to the challenging requirements of the aerospace, defense, and industrial sectors. The newly released component, an integral part of the company's dependable optocoupler line, offers a blend of exceptional electrical capabilities alongside a compact design. Noteworthy features of the product include a robust 12 kV Isolation Voltage for effective high-voltage control, impressive 8 kV Output Reverse Breakdown Voltage, utilization of 850 nm IR LED Emitters, and an error rate as low as 0.6%.

data.title: Geneva PE invests in NXXIM, an AI medical imaging platform, for faster clinician decisions; pilot deployments in 2026.(Numbers: Funding announcement, launch year, pilot deployments year)
data.description: A major investment by Geneva PE LLC in NXXIM is set to establish a state-of-the-art AI platform merging patient information to facilitate quicker clinical decisions, with initial implementations scheduled for 2026. Taking place in Miami on December 11, 2025, Geneva PE's financing aims to revolutionize medical technology by enhancing data accessibility for healthcare professionals through innovative technology.

data.title: Tenable partners with GSA OneGov to enhance cloud security for public sector, enabling proactive cyber risk reduction.
data.description: Collaboration between two entities improves security measures for cloud services in the public sector to minimize the likelihood of cyber threats. This partnership aims to enhance the overall security of government data by implementing advanced security protocols. This initiative is expected to reduce cyber risk by a significant percentage, ultimately providing better protection for sensitive government information.

data.title: Oxbridge and SurancePlus partner with Alphaledger to bring tokenized reinsurance to Solana blockchain, targeting 20% and 42% annual returns.
data.description: Oxbridge Re Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: OXBR) and its subsidiary, SurancePlus, have formed a partnership with Alphaledger to introduce tokenized reinsurance securities to the Solana blockchain. This collaboration was revealed at Solana Breakpoint 2025 in Grand Cayman. The goal is to make a traditionally institutional and uncorrelated asset class accessible to a wider range of investors by utilizing on-chain real-world assets. SurancePlus will offer tokenized reinsurance products through Alphaledger's Solana-native platform, with targeted annual returns of 20% and 42% for balanced-yield and high-yield products respectively. These fully collateralized instruments will be accessible to eligible Reg D and Reg S participants, such as sovereign wealth funds, institutions, corporates, and qualified accredited investors.

data.title: AGM on 11 December 2025 approved resolutions as per agenda.
data.description: During the annual general meeting held today, the attendees approved a series of resolutions outlined in the agenda.
